english: to walk along / to go along
notes: Separable verb (entlang- prefix). 'entlang' can follow the noun in accusative (die Straße entlanggehen) or precede it with dative (entlang der Straße gehen). The input 'entlang gegangen' is the past participle written as two words; the correct spelling is 'entlanggegangen' (one word).

sentences.german: Wir gehen die Straße entlang zum Park.
sentences.english: We walk along the street to the park.

sentences.german: Er ist den Fluss entlanggegangen und hat die Natur genossen.
sentences.english: He walked along the river and enjoyed nature.
